comment: MK move-set spec for Kimodo-SOMA-RP-v1.1. Combat is in Kimodo's training distribution, so moves are text-prompted; 'stance_bookend' moves get fullbody keyframe constraints at both ends once out/stance_pose.json exists (extracted from idle_stance). travel: expected net root X after canonicalization — 'fwd'/'back' gated on sign, 'in_place' on magnitude, null = don't gate.

moves.name: idle_stance
moves.prompt: A person stands in a fighting stance with fists raised, shifting their weight lightly, ready to fight.

moves.name: walk_fwd
moves.prompt: A person in a fighting stance with fists raised walks forward cautiously toward their opponent.

moves.name: walk_back
moves.prompt: A person in a fighting stance with fists raised carefully steps backward away from their opponent.

moves.name: jump_up
moves.prompt: A person crouches down and jumps straight up into the air, then lands on their feet.

moves.name: crouch
moves.prompt: A person in a fighting stance crouches down low into a defensive squat, holds it, then stands back up into the fighting stance.

moves.name: block_high
moves.prompt: A person in a fighting stance raises both forearms up in front of their face to block an incoming attack, holds the guard, then lowers back to the fighting stance.

moves.name: jab
moves.prompt: A person in a fighting stance throws one quick sharp jab punch, then snaps back to the fighting stance.

moves.name: punch_heavy
moves.prompt: A person throws a single powerful cross punch, stepping into it with their whole body, then returns to the fighting stance.

moves.name: uppercut
moves.prompt: A person in a fighting stance dips down and throws a rising uppercut punch, then returns to the fighting stance.

moves.name: kick_front
moves.prompt: A person in a fighting stance throws a quick front kick with their leg, then returns to the fighting stance.

moves.name: kick_high
moves.prompt: A person in a fighting stance throws a high roundhouse kick at head height, then returns to the fighting stance.

moves.name: kick_side
moves.prompt: A person in a fighting stance throws a powerful side kick, driving their heel into the opponent, then returns to the fighting stance.

moves.name: sweep
moves.prompt: A person in a fighting stance crouches down and performs a low spinning leg sweep along the ground, then rises back into the fighting stance.

moves.name: hit_head
moves.prompt: A person gets punched in the face, their head snapping back as they stagger a step backward, then they recover into a fighting stance.

moves.name: hit_heavy
moves.prompt: A person gets hit hard in the body, doubling over and stumbling backward, then recovers into a fighting stance.

moves.name: knockdown
moves.prompt: A person gets knocked down and falls backward flat onto the ground, then rolls over and gets back up onto their feet into a fighting stance.

moves.name: victory
moves.prompt: A person raises both fists over their head and celebrates a triumphant victory, flexing with pride.
